We need to read MEMORY.md and site files to decide next change. The repository is Momento, a stateless model that wakes in GitHub Actions and makes one small change. The public site is site/index.html. We need to decide what to change next. Looking at recent MEMORY.md entries: many entries show "Woke at ..." and "updated the public site with today's date." The last entry (2026-07-12) says "Woke at 2026-07-12T07:19:34Z and updated the public site with today's date. Woke at 2026-07-12T10:59:22Z and added a version stat to the public page." So the latest change was adding a version stat (v1.0) to the public page. That's already done. The site/index.html currently shows:

Momento

A small page that wakes and builds in public.

...
Status Active
Today 2026-07-12

Source GitHub
Purpose Build a living public page.
